expectations.text: Case focus is explicitly covered: blind shipment checkpoint covers prompt lifecycle, template flow, builder loading, and close or save decision safety
expectations.evidence: result.md explicitly enumerates all four focus areas as required coverage: “This benchmark requires demonstrating the Phase 5b shipment checkpoint review explicitly covering: - Prompt lifecycle - Template flow - Builder loading - Close vs Save decision safety” and further lists adjacent issues grouped under each focus area.

expectations.text: Output aligns with primary phase phase5b
expectations.evidence: result.md is explicitly framed as Phase 5b and evaluates Phase 5b contract artifacts and gates: title “Phase 5b Shipment Checkpoint Enforcement”, and sections “Missing required Phase 5b artifacts (hard gate)” and “Missing required Phase 5b inputs (cannot perform checkpoint audit)” referencing Phase 5b-required outputs (checkpoint_audit, checkpoint_delta, qa_plan_phase5b).
